title: Adding Style
description: Add a <style> block inside the head to style your recipe page. Set body font-family, color, and background-color. Style h1 and h2 with a different color. Set img max-width to 100% so images don't overflow. Add basic margin or padding for spacing.
starter_code:
# Recipe Collection Website — Step 4: Adding Style # Add a

My Recipe Collection

Welcome to my favorite recipes!

Classic Pancakes

Fluffy, golden pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast.

Ingredients

  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup milk
  • 2 tbsp butter

Instructions

  1. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl
  2. Add eggs and milk, stir until smooth
  3. Heat a pan and melt butter
  4. Pour batter and cook until golden

© 2026 My Recipe Collection

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '<style>' in html.lower() and '</style>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <style> block in the head'
assert 'font-family' in html.lower(), 'Must set font-family on the body'
assert 'background-color' in html.lower(), 'Must set background-color on the body'
assert 'color' in html.lower(), 'Must set a text color'
assert 'max-width' in html.lower(), 'Must set max-width on images (e.g., max-width: 100%)'
assert '<header>' in html.lower() and '<main>' in html.lower(), 'Must keep semantic structure'
assert '<h2>' in html.lower() and '<ul>' in html.lower() and '<ol>' in html.lower(), 'Must keep recipe content from previous step'
acceptance_criteria: A <style> block is present inside the <head>
Body has font-family, color, and background-color set
Images have max-width: 100% to prevent overflow
All previous recipe content is preserved
hints: Add the style block inside <head>: <style>body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }</style>
